description: Analyze the relative mix of customer segments across different regions using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx). Create a 100% Stacked Bar Chart visualization showing the Number of Orders by Region, colored by Customer Segment. Set the chart title to "Customer Mix by Region" and save the workbook as "Segment_Mix_Analysis".
